strands.title: Data model
strands.claim: Use sessions, side-thread records, and merge records.

strands.title: UI flow
strands.claim: Use root input, side-thread prompts, Run, and Weave controls.

strands.title: Evaluation
strands.claim: Test compatible context, soft disagreement, and material conflict.

description: Strands differ in emphasis but combine into one next action.

strands.title: Speed first
strands.claim: Build the fastest rough prototype to validate the merge workflow.

strands.title: Fidelity matters
strands.claim: Make the prototype clean enough to test whether the workflow feels good.

strands.title: Multi-provider
strands.claim: Support OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and Ollama from day one.

strands.title: Single provider
strands.claim: Support one provider first, then add the rest later.

expected_choices: Proceed with multi-provider support from day one.
Proceed with one provider first, then add others later.
